biography: Mikko, a familiar face from Kurk Golf, is a respected competitor known for his calm demeanor and strategic play on the course.

While Mikko's trophy case might not yet be overflowing, his single past appearance at the Hector Trophée demonstrates his dedication to the sport and the camaraderie it fosters. Although he will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026, Mikko remains an active member of the golfing community and a potential future contender.
